=== bd81-07-09.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 
7/9/81, 
Drammenshallen, 
Drammen, Norway

2CDR

(72min+68min), 

master aud, excellent sound; 

d1t1 starts in the song;  small drop d2t5 0:58



The '81 Masters: Legendary Taper D
source: cdr>CDDAE>Sonic Foundry>mkwshn
equipment: Sennheiser MKE2002/Sony TC-D5/Maxell UDXLII

CD1

1 Come On In This House

2 It's Gonna Rain Again

3 Show Me The Way

4 Saved By The Grace Of Your Love (Willie Smith/David Palmer)

5 Gotta Serve Somebody

12 Dead Man, Dead Man

14 Ballad Of A Thin Man
